name: com.nekuzaky.kinema
description: Data-driven motion matching locomotion for Unity. Offline bake pipeline from AnimationClips, a normalized feature database, a configurable weighted scorer, a PlayableGraph runtime, and an integrated editor tool with live debug. Built to stay small and readable while remaining extensible toward mirroring, tags, contacts and cost breakdowns.

samples.description: A ready-to-run locomotion scene (rig, controller, collision motor, input, follow camera) with a one-click setup that generates demo animations when you do not supply your own.
